case_title: WONG, PAUL vs. JOHNSON, VIKKI et al

docket_entries.description: CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/DOUGLAS PITCH- FORD AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDMENT FOR PL. - RESITUTION OF PREMISES AT 307 CAPP ST, #7, S.F, CA. - WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 12-8-93, 8AM - $2,767.27 RENT & DAM- AGES ($1400 SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED & CREDITED TOWARD OWED AMT) - $1,367.27 BAL. TO BE PD. IN 10 INSTALL. OF $125 MO. BEGINNING 2-8-94 & A FINAL PMT. OF $117.27 - DEF. WILL HAVE A 5DAY GRACE PERIOD FOR PMT OF INTALL. & IF PMT. IS LATER THAN 5DAYS BAL OWING WILL BE ACCELERATED & DUE - NO INTALL. PMT. IF DEF. HAS NOT VACATED BY 12-8-93 - ATTY. FEES & COSTS WVD. - NO FURTHER STAYS - PL. AGREES NOT TO DISCUSS SETTLE- MENT WITH OTHER TENANTS & WILL GIVE DEF. GOOD REFERENCE. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
